response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid software engineering experience but the technical stack is mismatched with the role. C++ exposure is limited to a ~6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015 and a bachelor thesis project; recent work centers on TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and React. There is no evidence of message brokers, MQTT, IEC 62443/SDL, industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850), or industrial automation domain experience required for this role.
strengths: Broad engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems with strong craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD)
Demonstrated work on low-latency, high-throughput, multi-threaded backend systems at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Mentoring and knowledge-sharing track record (workshops, dojos, Selenium course, conference talks)
concerns: Minimal and dated C++/STL hands-on experience — does not meet the core technical requirement
No exposure to industrial cybersecurity (IEC 62443), SDL, or industrial automation protocols (MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850)
No message-broker or event-driven architecture experience explicitly demonstrated in a C++ context

key_factors.factor: General senior engineering breadth and craftsmanship
